summary: Session 1 made Full-tier scaffolds omit verificationMode at both sites: spec.md.template's fixed line became the whole-line {{VERIFICATION_MODE_LINE}} token (consumerBootstrap.ts renders the full pre-082 line on lightweight, empty string on full, no blank-line residue), and gitScaffold.ts gates the .dabbler/verification-mode marker write to Lightweight (on Full it is neither written nor deleted, preserving a prior pick across a tier round-trip). Sibling audit per L-069-1: buildSessionGenPrompt's hard-requirements prose rescoped so Full sets OMIT the field, pinned with two Layer-2 tests; verificationModeRewrite already handles key-absent specs; start-here.md.template's prose mention named as a deferred residual (byte-identity tripwire). Full cold-start fixture regenerated; lightweight fixture byte-identical. Layer-2 suites extended (per-tier line presence, marker write matrix incl. full-preserves, structureOnly counts). Omission notes added to spec-md-schema.md and the authoring guide. Verification: round 1 ISSUES_FOUND (one context-gap Major, adjudicated not-reproducible via reshaped-context re-verify; two nits fixed); round 2 VERIFIED.

reason.specifics: Routed ai-assignment analysis (gemini-pro) recommends Claude Code claude-fable-5 @ medium for Session 2: UAT-checklist prose and release mechanics suit a capable cost-effective model, and same-provider continuity keeps the S1 context for the checklist's source-re-grounded strings.
